details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.breed_recommendation: Large, Shiba Inu, Corgi, Border Collie, Weight Range: 30-45 LBS
item_specifications.special_feature: 1 Orthopedic, 2 Suitable for Crates, 3 OEKO STANDARD-100, 4 Removable Washable Cover, 5 Non Skid Bottom

about_item: Optimal Joint Relief: 25D high-density foam molds to your pet’s body, easing joint pain and evenly distributing weight while promoting deep, restorative sleep. After receiving the dog bed and unpacking it, allow 24–72 hours for full rebound before use

Quality and Style: Soft ComfyFleece fabric keep your pet cozy, while the dog bed design blends seamless with your home decor. Please Note: this dog bed is NOT WATERPROOF. If your pet is prone to accidents, we recommend placing a pee pad to protect the cushion

Pet-Safe & Anti-Slip: CertiPUR-US foam and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 (24.HCN.46956) fabrics with an anti-slip base that ensures the dog bed stays firmly in place on any surface. Please Note: this dog mat is NOT CHEWPROOF. For puppies or dogs who love to chew, we advise supervised use to ensure it becomes a place for naps, not snacks!

Effortless Care: The removable, machine-washable cover is stain-resistant, making cleanup quick and easy. Machine wash the cover separately in cold water only. Use delicate cycle. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat (Below 140℉)

All-Purpose Design: Available in multiple sizes to suit any breed or lifestyle—perfect for home, travel or outdoor adventures. Before making your purchase, please kindly measure both your dog's size and the dimensions of your dog crate or refer to size guide image to find the best fitting dog bed

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, soft, and easy to clean, with a removable cover that's simple to put back on. The bed offers good value for money, and one customer notes it has egg crate style padding inside. While some customers report the bed is durable, others mention their dogs tore it apart within 24 hours. The thickness receives mixed feedback, with some finding it perfect while others say it's very thin.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Good quality but my dog doesn’t like it so much as it is not fluffy enough. Good bed, just not for my dog.
It’s a great bed! Thought it would be slightly bigger but non the less it was a perfect size. I love that I can was the outside cover.
...The material feels sturdy and well made, and it holds its shape even after lots of use. I’m really happy with it and would buy again. 🫶🏼
Great quality, soft, comfortable, and cover removes easily to wash.

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable and cozy.

examples.snippet: Absolutely perfect 👌 Fits in their crate and is so soft and comfortable. Very good quality too. It’s looks good and my dogs love it!...
My dog loves it! He seems comfy and cozy. I use it in my bedroom, great second bed to take a nap!!
Great size and very comfortable! Good bang for your buck. I have two beagles, and they both fit on it comfortably, all sprawled out....
Cozy but unsure of durability

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and not too firm, with one customer noting it has egg crate style padding inside.

examples.snippet: ...The covers were easy to put on and soft. I haven't had to wash them yet but the brown hides everyday dirt....
Absolutely perfect 👌 Fits in their crate and is so soft and comfortable. Very good quality too. It’s looks good and my dogs love it!...
Nice thick & firm but not too firm. We keep dog beds in both the bedroom & family room these are nice & affordable & good quality. Good value.
Nice soft bed for my dogs

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be a great value for the price.

examples.snippet: ...I just throw those away when I wash the covers and put new ones in. Good value when these are on sale.
This is a great bed for the price. It isn’t overly thick but it’s sufficiently thick for my pets....
Great dog bed for the money We have purchased several as we rescue dogs
...If you don't have a digger it's a decent bed for the money and perfect fit for the crate, but if you have a digger like ours this isn't a good choice...

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate that the pet bed is easy to wash, with a removable cover for cleaning.

examples.snippet: Awesome quality and thickness! It’s washable and my dog loves it!
My dog loves laying on the bed. It is so easy to clean.
While the cover is washable, it is not waterproof. So no accidents allowed....
...With this one, it doesn’t slip in the crate, easy to wash and put the cover back on, and she can’t rip between the ribbed fabric....

insights.title: Ease of cleaning
insights.summary: Customers find the pet bed easy to clean, as the cover is simple to remove and put back on.

examples.snippet: ...The cover was soft and easy to remove and wash. Unfortunately, our dog had a tantrum, broke the zipper and shredded the foam mattress....
My dog loves this bed. It is easy to remove the cover so you can wash it....
Great quality, soft, comfortable, and cover removes easily to wash.
...Excellent value, dense foam with cover removable for washing.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the dog bed's durability, with some finding it sturdy and holding its shape well, while others report that it ripped up within the first 24 hours of use.

examples.snippet: Very cushy and durable (Unless you have a big chewers, they chr through everything)
...Either way, was very easy to clean, but not very durable.
It’s a very good bed for the price. Quite lightweight probably easily destroyed if your dog is a chewer, the foam is supportive enough to support...
...I have two beagles, and they both fit on it comfortably, all sprawled out. Super easy to clean too!

insights.title: Thickness
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the dog bed's thickness, with some finding it perfect while others describe it as very thin.

examples.snippet: ...Perfect size perfect thickness. Two fit side by side and filled the entire floor area. Nice removeable cover for easy cleaning....
...The thickness isn’t even close, so very thin.
Dogs love this bed! Perfect size for my XL dog crate. It's thickness and comfort is beyond expectation for this price point!
My 26 pound cat instantly loved it. Very comfortable and thick. Has a zipper so you can easily wash it. Perfect size and quality

authors_reviews.title: Our 70 lb old boy likes this bed. We like it too.
authors_reviews.text: These are nice foam beds . We ordered two of them to put in the back seat floor area of truck. Perfect size perfect thickness. Two fit side by side and filled the entire floor area. Nice removeable cover for easy cleaning. Nice and soft for elder dogs. They have no trouble getting comfortable and sleeping during long rides. No weird smells as some people report with foam products. Happy with our purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Michigal

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bed for our dogs
authors_reviews.text: This is a great bed. It's soft, the perfect size for our dogs, nice and sturdy. The zipper is smooth and doesn't snag so that makes removing the cover nice and easy assemble and disassemble when washing it. Thankfully we haven't had to test out whether it's waterproof or not.
authors_reviews.author: Dana J Cadotte

authors_reviews.title: Creature comforts
authors_reviews.text: Good quality and fit for large crate. Excellent value, dense foam with cover removable for washing.
authors_reviews.author: Zachary J. Berry

authors_reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ My German Shepherd Loves This Bed
authors_reviews.text: My German Shepherd absolutely loves this bed and sleeps on it all day. It’s 1.5-2 inches thick, supportive, and seems comfortable for a larger dog.The material feels sturdy and well made, and it holds its shape even after lots of use.I’m really happy with it and would buy again. 🫶🏼
authors_reviews.author: Elisa Fightmaster

authors_reviews.title: Great beds for the cost.
authors_reviews.text: I needed 6 crate beds in various sizes. Absolutely had to be removable covers. These beds filled the request. A much better product and a least $10 cheaper than the ones I bought 3 years ago. Foam bed is actually 3-4 inches thick and solid. Really nice. Cover is thin but well made. Fit all my crates as measured. Dogs love them. As a note, I use old blanket/sheets to make an extra pillow case style cover for each that reduces wear and tear and can be easily removed to wash while not having to unzipper a cover. I also wash on gentle and dry on minimum gentle cycle. I purchased these on a limited time sale so I saved a lot.Great bed and very pleased.
authors_reviews.author: Paula Anselmo

authors_reviews.title: Very nice dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: This is a real nice dog bed. The foam interior is supportive for my Belgian Sheepdog. The cover zips off and washes up great. I don't put it in the dryer, just air dry. Looks like new after washing. My dog seems to enjoy it... it's in her sleeping crate, where she prefers to sleep at night.
authors_reviews.author: D. Phelps

authors_reviews.title: My dogs love it!
authors_reviews.text: Absolutely perfect 👌 Fits in their crate and is so soft and comfortable. Very good quality too. It’s looks good and my dogs love it! Glad I bought this one.
authors_reviews.author: Tracy

authors_reviews.title: Comfy, easy to clean, but not very durable.
authors_reviews.text: Lasted about six months. Don't buy if you have a large dog who's nesting. The memory foam is comfortable but easily torn up. Either way, was very easy to clean, but not very durable.
authors_reviews.author: Angela

other_countries_reviews.title: Super Hundematratze
other_countries_reviews.text: Sehr zufrieden mit der Matratze, Stärke ist so wie angegeben, wirkt stabil und fest, auch die Eierkartonform ist sehr stabil und bleibt in Form. Habe für meinen Senior ein größeres Modell genommen, er hat ausreichend Platz und eine gute Unterlage, liegt bequem. Bezug ist weich und waschbar. Leider nicht wasserfest. @Bedsure: Ein Ersatzbezug zum wechseln wäre super!
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Kunde

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog Bed
other_countries_reviews.text: Bought two of these now, a little pricey but decent quality.
other_countries_reviews.author: josh

other_countries_reviews.title: Tolles Produkt
other_countries_reviews.text: Ein tolles Produkt!! Man kann den Überzug, der mit einen langen Zipp (3 Seiten) versehen ist. Unser Hund ist ein Riesenschnautzer und hat genügend Platz. Der Preis ist mehr als okay.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ina

other_countries_reviews.title: Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis stimmt
other_countries_reviews.text: Hier stimmt das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Unser 55 kg schwerer Hund fühlt sich wohl. Die Matratze ist fest genug, um sein Gewicht gut aufzufangen und sorgt zugleich mit ihrer Struktur für Schlafcomfort. Die waschbare Hülle erscheint robust und fühlt sich zugleich weich an. Wunderbar!
other_countries_reviews.author: Andreas Luks
